title: Vanilla Client
description: A Client Made For Newer Version Of Minecraft.
body:
# Vanilla Client

Vanilla Client is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds practical quality-of-life improvements while keeping Minecraft close to vanilla.

## Features

### Vanilla Client Tweaks
Includes useful built-in visual and gameplay tweaks designed for everyday play.

- Gamma adjustment
- Night Vision
- Pumpkin overlay adjustment
- Fire offset adjustment
- Shield offset adjustment
- Totem size adjustment
- Totem pop animation
- Totem pop size adjustment
- Totem pop offset adjustment
- Built-in riptide shield fix

### Taco's Stay Vanilla
Includes Taco's Stay Vanilla as a built-in resource pack.

- Automatically enabled
- Hidden from the Resource Packs list
- No separate resource pack installation required

### Clear Water and Lava
Improves visibility by reducing heavy fog and visual obstruction in water and lava.

### Shield Fixes
Improves shield behavior with more reliable blocking and better feedback.

### Faster Loading Screen Transitions
Makes loading and reconfiguration transitions smoother and less disruptive.

### Multiplayer Improvements
Improves server list behavior and related multiplayer menu handling.

### Bundles Beyond
Improves bundle interaction and display while keeping the feature lightweight and integrated into the client.

### Food HUD Overlays
Adds built-in food-related HUD and tooltip improvements directly into Vanilla Client.

- Food values in tooltips
- Saturation overlay
- Held food restore overlay
- Offhand food overlay support
- Exhaustion underlay
- Estimated health restore overlay
- Vanilla-style HUD animation support

### PvP HitBox
Adds a built-in PvP hitbox option directly inside the Vanilla Client settings.

- Target hitbox coloring
- Custom hitbox colors
- Custom line width defaults
- Optional eye-height and look-direction rendering
- Optional stuck arrow hiding
- Lightweight built-in config

### Armor HUD
Adds an integrated armor HUD for quickly viewing armor durability.

- Side selection
- Durability warning support
- Hotbar-style display

### Locator Bar
Adds locator bar improvements for nearby players and compass-style tracking.

- Player head markers
- Compass overlay support
- Lodestone and recovery compass support
- Built-in enable/disable option

### Peek Tooltips
Adds preview tooltips for supported items and containers.

- Shulker box preview
- Ender chest preview
- Bundle preview
- Compass preview
- Recovery compass preview
- Suspicious stew preview

### Utility Toggles
Adds simple built-in toggles for cleaner gameplay.

- Atmospheric Fog
- Simple F3+G
- Use-less Overlay
- Scoreboard
- Sign GUI

### View Bobbing Options
Adds more control over bobbing behavior for camera and hand movement.

### Map Distance Fix
Adds map-related distance improvements and clearer distance display behavior.

### Built-in Mods Screen
Adds a clean built-in mods screen for viewing installed main mods.

- Alphabetically sorted mod list
- Built-in update badges
- Config button support for compatible mods
- Feedback button integration

## Notes

- Client-side only
- Fabric mod
- No server installation required
- No extra config library required for Vanilla Client settings

Vanilla Client is made for players who want a cleaner, more useful client without unnecessary bloat.
